audit our checkout page for WCAG 2.2 AA — keyboard-only path, focus order, contrast, and screen-reader labels. here's the rendered html and the component tree
users keep telling support they can't find the billing settings in our dashboard. the nav has grown to 14 top-level items. want an IA / wayfinding review before the redesign
our error states feel punitive — a failed payment just says 'Error 4012' with no next step, and the delete-account confirm is a single OK button. sweep our error and recovery copy
run a heuristic evaluation on this onboarding flow — new users say they're confused about what to do first and bounce before activating
do an accessibility readiness check before launch: keyboard traps, focus visibility, color contrast, alt text, and semantic landmarks across the marketing site
our 12-field B2B lead form has terrible completion. labels are placeholder-only, validation fires on every keystroke, and there's no way to recover a mistyped field. review the form UX
the settings area is a maze — three different ways to get to notification preferences and none of them feel like the obvious one. review information architecture
verify whether UX-FORM-003 is fixed using docs/audits/ux-critique-workflow-state-2026-05-22-signup.json and this PR diff that reworked the inline validation
users abandon the password-reset flow — the email link expires silently and the only error is a blank page. audit the recovery experience
i want to redesign our dashboard visually — pick a color system, type scale, spacing, and build a polished component library. make it look modern
prototype a new onboarding screen flow in react with tailwind so i can click through it in the browser
design system question: should our button tokens use semantic names like primary/danger or role-based ones, and how do i set up the theme contract?
our cli's --help output is dense and new joiners can't tell --region from --zone. take a pass at the help layout and tell me what to tighten
audit our public REST API for friction — error envelope shape, pagination, idempotency, and whether an integrator can use it without reading the source
review this terraform module's variable docs and outputs — could a developer who's never seen this module use it without reading the source?
Claude Code keeps tripping on our repo — wrong test commands, blocked pushes, bad AGENTS.md. make it agent-friendly
the production reporting query is slow at 2pm every day, help me trace what's saturating postgres
explain how WCAG conformance levels A / AA / AAA differ — i'm writing a one-pager for the legal team
refactor this react component to extract the form state into a custom hook
